# Ofry Linkovsky

> Software engineer and Platform Engineering Lead — endlessly curious, perpetually tinkering. Personal portfolio at https://ofryl.github.io covering experience, projects, and contact links.

Background: started with a soldering iron and a pile of components — RF circuits, microcontrollers, code that talks to hardware. Still builds for fun (Telegram bots, browser plugins, weekend experiments), lately focused on AI: wiring up LLMs, building agents and MCP servers.

## Experience

- [Tastewise — Platform Engineering Lead](https://ofryl.github.io): Leads a team of 4 driving AI platform initiatives — MCP servers for food & beverage market intelligence, LLM integration, and enterprise SSO. Owns technical direction for frontend infrastructure, E2E testing, and code quality.
- [Autofleet — Founding Engineer](https://ofryl.github.io): Founding engineer from seed through acquisition in 2024. Built the core platform from zero to serve enterprise clients globally with real-time fleet optimization across React, Node.js, and GCP.

## Projects

- [esp-cyd-mcp](https://github.com/OfryL/esp-cyd-mcp): Control an ESP32 Cheap-Yellow-Display over MCP — bridging LLMs straight to physical hardware (C++).
- [nullboard-nodejs-agent](https://github.com/OfryL/nullboard-nodejs-agent): Backup agent for Nullboard — saves boards to disk automatically (JavaScript).
- [Autofleet / locomotion](https://github.com/autofleet/locomotion): Open-source rider/passenger mobile app, customizable for any ride-hailing operation (React Native, Node.js).

## Contributions

- [ESP32-Cheap-Yellow-Display](https://github.com/witnessmenow/ESP32-Cheap-Yellow-Display): Community around a cheap ESP32 display with a touch screen.
- [anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code): Agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal.
- [deluge-torrent/deluge](https://github.com/deluge-torrent/deluge): Deluge BitTorrent client.
